privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Welcome to Droutfit ("Company", "we", "our", "us"). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting it through our compliance with this policy. Our platform provides AI-driven virtual try-on technology that helps customers visualize clothing items.

sections.s1_content: We collect several types of information from and about users of our service, including: (a) Personal identifiers such as name, email address, and IP address for account management and security. (b) Media files: Images uploaded by shoppers for virtual try-on processing. (c) Store data: Product images and metadata from connected merchant stores.
sections.s2_content: We use information that we collect about you or that you provide to us to: (a) Provide and maintain the DrOutfit AI engine and widget on merchant stores. (b) Process and generate hyper-realistic try-on results. (c) Prevent fraudulent activity and enforce IP-based rate limiting to protect merchant credits.
sections.s3_content: DrOutfit operates on a privacy-first principle. Shopper photos uploaded for try-on are processed through our neural fits and are not permanently stored on our public servers once the session expires. We adhere to GDPR and CCPA standards, ensuring edge caches are cleared to protect user identity.
sections.s4_content: We may share your information with trusted third-party providers who perform services for us: (a) Supabase for secure database management. (b) Whop & Stripe for encrypted payment processing. (c) Resend for transactional emails regarding your account.
sections.s5_content: We have implemented measures designed to secure your personal information from accidental loss and from unauthorized access, use, and disclosure. All payment transactions are encrypted using SSL technology through our payment partners.
sections.s6_content: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and remember your preferences. We do not use tracking cookies for third-party advertising.
sections.s7_content: Depending on your location, you may have rights under GDPR, CCPA, or other local laws to access, delete, or correct your personal data. You can manage your information through your dashboard or contact our support team.
sections.s8_content: To ask questions or comment about this privacy policy and our privacy practices, contact us at: support@droutfit.com

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: By accessing or using Droutfit's services, you agree to be bound by these terms. Our platform provides AI-driven virtual try-on technology for fashion e-commerce.

sections.s1_content: By creating an account or using our widget, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must not use our services.
sections.s2_content: DrOutfit provides an AI engine that generates virtual try-on images. We grant you a limited, non-exclusive license to use our widget and dashboard for your business operations.
sections.s3_content: You are responsible for the images you upload and ensure they do not violate any third-party rights. Merchants must provide accurate store URLs and not attempt to bypass credit limits.
sections.s4_content: The DrOutfit AI model, software, and branding remain the exclusive property of DrOutfit. Users retain rights to their original product photos but grant us a license to process them for the service.
sections.s5_content: DrOutfit is provided 'as is'. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our AI technology or service interruptions.
sections.s6_content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, engage in credit fraud, or misuse our API.
sections.s7_content: These terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction where DrOutfit is registered, without regard to its conflict of law principles.
sections.s8_content: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all first-time subscriptions. If you are not satisfied with the AI results or integration behavior, contact our support team within 30 days for a full refund of your subscription fee.

integrationsPage.title: Integrations
integrationsPage.subtitle: Connect DrOutfit with your favorite e-commerce platforms.
integrationsPage.step1: Download our dedicated WooCommerce plugin zip.
integrationsPage.step2: Upload & Activate it in your WordPress admin panel.
integrationsPage.step3: Log in within the plugin using your DrOutfit account.
integrationsPage.step4: All your products will automatically get the Try-On button.
integrationsPage.shopifyDesc: Are you a Shopify Merchant? Link your store to DrOutfit to instantly sync your products and give your customers the ultimate AI Try-On experience.
